name: Canada
description: ~40 expense rules covering common Canadian household transactions. Includes major regional chains in ON, QC, BC, and Atlantic Canada, plus housing, car maintenance, health, personal care, pets, education, giving, and fees.

rules.name: Groceries — major chains
rules.pattern: (?i)loblaws|no ?frills|real canadian (superstore|liquor)|\bmetro inc\b|\bmetro plus\b|sobeys|\biga\b|\bmaxi\b|provigo|save-?on-?foods|\bt & ?t\b|whole foods|farm boy|fortinos|food basics|valu-?mart|zehrs|longo'?s|freshco|atlantic superstore|your independent grocer|farmboy
